creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
rooneg@electricjellyfish.net wrote:
[snip]
> 	fetch http://electricjellyfish.net/diffutils-port.tar.gz and stick it 
> 	in ports/textproc.  note that this is the first time i've put a port 
> 	together myself, so someone should probably check it over pretty 
> 	closely.  i pretty much copied everything from /ports/devel/patch, but 
> 	it's reasonably likely that i screwed something up.

here is the reviewed diffutils port.

changes are :

	Makefile
		config.hin patch deleted (not needed).
		provides info files deleted.
		Makefile.in patch added (makeinfo --no-split).
		info file registering added.

	pkg-comment
		changed to match other GNU utilities ports comments.

	pkg-descr
		ditto.

	pkg-plist
		$FreeBSD$ added.
		reordered.
		info file pre/post-treatments added.

	files/patch-diff.texi
		info dir entry section added.

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	diffutils/Makefile
#	diffutils/distinfo
#	diffutils/pkg-comment
#	diffutils/pkg-descr
#	diffutils/pkg-plist
#	diffutils/files/patch-diff.texi
#
echo x - diffutils/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >diffutils/Makefile << 'END-of-diffutils/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	diffutils
X# Date created:				5 September 2001
X# Whom:					rooneg@electricjellyfish.net
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	diffutils
XPORTVERSION=	2.7
XCATEGORIES=	textproc
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	diffutils
X
XMAINTAINER=	rooneg@electricjellyfish.net
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS= --program-prefix=g
X
XINSTALL_INFO?=	install-info
X
Xpost-extract: remove-info-files
X
Xremove-info-files:
X	@${RM} -f ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME:S/utils//}.info*
X
Xpost-patch: patch-makeinfo
X
Xpatch-makeinfo:
X	@${PERL} -pi.fbsd -e 's|makeinfo|makeinfo --no-split|g' \
X		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
X
Xpost-install: install-info
X
Xinstall-info:
X	@${INSTALL_INFO} ${PREFIX}/info/${PORTNAME:S/utils//}.info ${PREFIX}/info/dir
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-diffutils/Makefile
echo x - diffutils/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >diffutils/distinfo << 'END-of-diffutils/distinfo'
XMD5 (diffutils-2.7.tar.gz) = 300d86a0566afee1c3756828f6c9538a
END-of-diffutils/distinfo
echo x - diffutils/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >diffutils/pkg-comment << 'END-of-diffutils/pkg-comment'
XThe GNU diff utilities
END-of-diffutils/pkg-comment
echo x - diffutils/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >diffutils/pkg-descr << 'END-of-diffutils/pkg-descr'
XThe Free Software Foundation's "diff" utilities, including "diff",
X"diff3", "sdiff", and "cmp".
X
XThese utilities exist in the FreeBSD base collection, but the GNU
Xversions have added functionality that is sometimes useful.
X
XNote that this port will install these utilities with a `g' prefix,
Xfor example gdiff, gdiff3, ggcmp, but the texinfo documentation
Xwill refer to these utilities without the `g' prefix.
X
XWWW: http://www.gnu.org/software/diffutils/diffutils.html
END-of-diffutils/pkg-descr
echo x - diffutils/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >diffutils/pkg-plist << 'END-of-diffutils/pkg-plist'
X@comment $FreeBSD$
Xbin/gcmp
Xbin/gdiff
Xbin/gdiff3
Xbin/gsdiff
X@unexec install-info --quiet --delete %D/info/diff.info %D/info/dir
Xinfo/diff.info
X@exec install-info %D/info/diff.info %D/info/dir
END-of-diffutils/pkg-plist
echo x - diffutils/files/patch-diff.texi
sed 's/^X//' >diffutils/files/patch-diff.texi << 'END-of-diffutils/files/patch-diff.texi'
X--- diff.texi.orig	Fri Sep 30 21:54:40 1994
X+++ diff.texi	Sat Sep  8 16:56:14 2001
X@@ -6,6 +6,18 @@
X @c %**end of header
X 
X @ifinfo
X+@format
X+INFO-DIR-SECTION Comparing and Merging Files
X+START-INFO-DIR-ENTRY
X+* Comparing files: (diff).      Comparing and Merging Files.
X+* cmp: (diff)cmp invocation.                    Compares two files.
X+* diff: (diff)diff invocation.                  Pretty compares two files.
X+* diff3: (diff)diff3 invocation.                Compares and Merges three files.
X+* patch: (diff)patch invocation.                Apply a diff file to an original
X+* sdiff: (diff)sdiff invocation.                Interactively compares two files
X+END-INFO-DIR-ENTRY
X+@end format
X+
X This file documents the the GNU @code{diff}, @code{diff3}, @code{sdiff},
X and @code{cmp} commands for showing the differences between text files
X and the @code{patch} command for using their output to update files.
END-of-diffutils/files/patch-diff.texi
exit

Cyrille.
-- 
Cyrille Lefevre                 mailto:clefevre@citeweb.net
